title: theodorea neglecta
intro: Theodorea neglecta, also known as the Red Sandalwood or West Indian Sandalwood, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The medicinal properties of Theodorea neglecta include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, making it useful for treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of this plant include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. Theodorea neglecta can be used in herbal preparations such as essential oils, teas, and infusions, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
